name: everybody-always
description: Bob Goff's 'Everybody, Always: Becoming Love in a World Full of Setbacks and Difficult People' — a story-driven guide to loving the hardest-to-love people through extravagant grace, bold action, and fearless faith.
useCase: Learn to love difficult people, overcome fear of rejection, take bold loving action, and handle setbacks with extravagant grace.
knownRisks: Christian faith-based perspective — may not resonate with non-Christian readers
Story-driven, not system-driven — principles are embedded in narratives, not frameworks
Goff's 'love everybody always' is intentionally provocative — not a license to tolerate abuse, but a call to radical grace
